title: Elite Publishing House E-Waste Management Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the lifecycle of electronic equipment at a publishing house, from procurement to responsible end-of-life disposal, highlighting e-waste management practices.
relationships: Flow starts with Procurement leading to Use Phase, which eventually leads to an End-of-Life Decision. This decision branches to either Refurbishment/Reuse (which loops back to a new user) or to Decommissioning. Decommissioning leads to Data Destruction, then to Recycling, with Landfill shown as an undesirable, off-shoot outcome to be avoided.
